build.buildCommand: EXPO_PUBLIC_DOMAIN=gameplanjarvisai.up.railway.app EXPO_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_WEB_CLIENT_ID=$GOOGLE_WEB_CLIENT_ID npx expo export --platform web --output-dir static-build/web --clear && npm run server:build && node scripts/patch-chat-template.mjs

deploy.startCommand: npm run db:push -- --force && node scripts/railway-prestart.mjs && npm run server:prod
